description.intro: I build digital products using modern technologies and real-world experience.
description.main: are my primary focus areas — from startup products to production-grade systems software.

paragraphs: I've always been driven by the challenge of building from the ground up. My career began in the high-energy environments of hackathons and early-stage startups, where I worked alongside founders to shape products from scratch. These experiences instilled in me a product-first mindset: the ability to move fast, take ownership, and build features that solve genuine user needs.

Currently, at Arista Networks, I've shifted my focus toward the foundations of computing, working on software that operates close to the hardware. In an environment where performance and correctness are non-negotiable, I develop components within complex frameworks, prioritizing test-driven development and long-term maintainability. This role has sharpened my technical precision and my appreciation for clean, scalable system architecture.

Whether I'm navigating the ambiguity of a new venture or the rigorous engineering standards of a global leader, my goal remains the same: to understand exactly how things work so I can build systems that work better. I thrive on diving into technical challenges that demand both creative problem-solving and a disciplined approach to craftsmanship.

stats.label: Full-Stack Architecture
stats.sublabel: Engineering scalable Go and Node.js systems with React frontends and Python-driven microservices.

stats.label: Systems & Low-Level
stats.sublabel: Developing performance-critical software focusing on Linux Kernel, system reliability, and hardware-near logic.

stats.label: Agentic AI Workflows
stats.sublabel: Designing autonomous agents for intelligent code reviews and automated workspace communication.

stats.label: DevOps & CI/CD
stats.sublabel: Optimizing delivery pipelines through Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration.

stats.label: Advanced Networking
stats.sublabel: Hands-on expertise in SRv6, Broadcom silicon, and high-performance packet processing.

stats.label: Home-Lab Ecosystems
stats.sublabel: Building resilient personal server infrastructures using Ubuntu, Netdata, and Cloudflare Tunnels.

stats.label: Network Security
stats.sublabel: Developing AI-driven threat detection models to secure complex network architectures.

stats.label: Open Source & Scripting
stats.sublabel: Automating system management and deploying modern stack environments via Coolify and custom tooling.

metadata.title: Ghanashyam Bhat | Software Engineer - Full-Stack & Systems Developer
metadata.description: Ghanashyam Bhat is a Software Engineer at Arista Networks specializing in full-stack development (Go, React, Python), systems software, Linux kernel, advanced networking (SRv6), and DevOps. Explore his portfolio, projects, and open-source work.
